## 🎯 Objective

## ✅ Definition of Done

- [ ] Terraform code is formatted and validated.
- [ ] Infrastructure is provisioned in the correct AWS region.
- [ ] State is stored in the remote S3 backend.
- [ ] Resources follow the project tagging schema.
- [ ] Functional test passed (e.g., connectivity verified).

## 🛠 Tasks

- [ ] Create branch `task/efi-XXXX`
- [ ] Implement `providers.tf`, `main.tf`, and `outputs.tf`
- [ ] Run `terraform apply`
- [ ] Verify resources in AWS Console/CLI

- Parent Issue: #
